summary: Natural Nation is a mobile-first holistic wellness platform supported by a public brand website and Duey, an AI wellness mentor.
problem: People need practical, personalized guidance that turns holistic wellness goals into simple daily actions.
users: Adults age 21 and older seeking practical holistic wellness support
People who value whole-food, anti-inflammatory, and Dr. Sebi-inspired wellness principles
Users who need clear daily protocols, progress visibility, and supportive AI guidance

products.name: Natural Nation Brand Website
products.purpose: Explain the brand, establish trust, educate visitors, and guide qualified users toward the application.

products.name: Natural Nation Mobile Application
products.purpose: Deliver onboarding, personalized blueprints, daily protocols, progress tracking, scores, and Duey guidance.

products.name: Duey AI Mentor
products.purpose: Provide practical, non-medical wellness education, accountability, clarification, and personalized guidance.

coreJourneys: Guest enters onboarding and selects goals
Founder-approved rules generate a personalized wellness blueprint
User enters the Day 1 dashboard and receives a daily mission
User follows a time-based daily protocol
User records progress across energy, digestion, mood, sleep, and completion
Duey explains recommendations and supports consistency
Guest upgrades to a registered account without losing data

included: Email, Google, and Apple account upgrade path

capabilities.name: Public web publishing
capabilities.reason: Natural Nation needs a public brand presence.

capabilities.name: Mobile application delivery
capabilities.reason: The core user experience is mobile-first.

capabilities.name: Identity and guest upgrade
capabilities.reason: Users need accounts while preserving guest progress.

capabilities.name: Persistent wellness data
capabilities.reason: Blueprints, protocol completion, progress, and memory must be stored.

capabilities.name: AI mentor orchestration
capabilities.reason: Duey is a core product experience.

capabilities.name: Knowledge and decision retrieval
capabilities.reason: Duey and Founder OS must use approved rules and canonical records.

capabilities.name: Notifications
capabilities.reason: Reminders may improve protocol consistency but are not essential to prove the MVP.

capabilities.name: Analytics
capabilities.reason: Basic product and retention insight will support iteration after launch.

capabilities.name: Subscription billing
capabilities.reason: Billing changes scope, security, access control, and launch planning.

capabilities.name: CRM and social publishing
capabilities.reason: Useful for growth, but unnecessary for the first working release.

applications.name: Assets
applications.supports: Brand, Duey, UI, and production media

openDecisions.title: MVP subscription billing
openDecisions.question: Should paid subscription billing be included in the first Natural Nation MVP release?
openDecisions.impact: Determines whether Billing, subscription access control, receipts, and payment security are part of the first release.

approvalEffect: Founder approval will establish this blueprint as the execution contract for future AI planning and implementation. It will not install applications or change repositories until protected execution is available.
